caption: A screen recording captures a digital interface showing a numbered list of names and a live stream window. In the stream, a man wearing a black t-shirt is visible from the chest up. To the right of the list, a chat log shows messages from "glowbug27" and "Nightbot," with the latter providing a link that reads "Click the link for the BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE! >>> https://bit.ly/NzDEKkS49". The bottom of the screen features a red and white banner for "CASEBREAKS.com". Between the initial and final states, the view shifts to a website called "RANDOM.ORG", which displays a "List Randomizer" tool. This tool presents a reorganized version of the names from the original list, starting with "1. Cj Munrose" and "2. Ryan Cason". The sequence ends by returning to the original interface with the live stream and chat log.
